recommendations.title: The Newton Boys
recommendations.overview: The story of the Newton gang, the most successful bank robbers in history, owing to their good planning and minimal violence.

recommendations.title: At the End of the Tunnel
recommendations.overview: A paraplegic computer engineer who moves in a wheelchair and works in his basement starts hearing noises and voices of bank-robbers.

recommendations.title: The Long Riders
recommendations.overview: The origins, exploits and the ultimate fate of the James gang is told in a sympathetic portrayal of the bank robbers made up of brothers who begin their legendary bank raids because of revenge.

recommendations.title: Marauders
recommendations.overview: An untraceable group of elite bank robbers is chased by a suicidal FBI agent who uncovers a deeper purpose behind the robbery-homicides.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.

recommendations.title: How to Rob a Bank
recommendations.overview: Caught in the middle of a bank robbery, a slacker and a bank employee become the ones who arbitrate the intense situation.

recommendations.title: Foxy Brown
recommendations.overview: A voluptuous black woman takes a job as a high-class prostitute in order to get revenge on the mobsters who murdered her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Wheelman
recommendations.overview: A getaway driver for a bank robbery realizes he has been double crossed and races to find out who betrayed him.

recommendations.title: The Heist of the Century
recommendations.overview: In 2006, a group of thieves performed what is considered one of the most famous and smart bank heists in the history of Argentina. How they robbed the Rio bank is as surprising as what happened afterwards. This is their story.

recommendations.title: Stander
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Andre Stander, a South African police officer turned bank robber.
